text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to the roof after receiving an invitation
from Kawakami Princess.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale... And soon, when Trainer arrives...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
W-wait a moment! You're far too early! This
means...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: It's time for take two!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Take two.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh, you've arrived, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Um... Well...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: T-t-today... Today, um, uh...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...What was my next line again?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Okay, take three!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ahem!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: "Oh, you've arrived, Trainer."

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
"Are you aware of what day it is today? February
is the season of sweet memories..."

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Yes! Valentine's Day! Therefore...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Please accept this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her face tinged with a bright-red hue, Kawakami
Princess hands me a cutely wrapped box.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Y-you're welcome! S-so...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Um... About my Valentine's Day gift...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Did I follow proper etiquette as I handed it to
you?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I did a bunch of research so that I could do
everything right today!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
First of all, the type of sweets you gift someone
will change the meaning. I think the timing also
matters too...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
True elegance means always choosing the most
appropriate course of action. Even when giving a
gift to a close associate, I must strive for that
ideal...
choice_data_list: You didn't have to go that far.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
B-but if I mess up, the person receiving the gift
won't be as happy as if I did it correctly...
choice_data_list: It's the thought alone that makes me happy.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
choice_data_list: Is it okay if I eat some?
Is it okay if I eat some?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: O-of course! Please go ahead!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I unwrap Kawakami Princess's gift to find
chocolates from a famous store I often read
about on the internet.
choice_data_list: You got so many for me.
You got so many for me.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Well, I wanted to make you really happy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stuff my face with chocolate as Kawakami
Princess watches.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh—hold on! May I ask you to wait just a
moment?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
There's one more thing that I, um, would like to
do.
choice_data_list: Is this part of that etiquette stuff?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No... Or at least, it wasn't mentioned anywhere in
the stuff I read...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Um, apparently there's a trick to putting your
feelings into handmade sweets, which makes them
taste even better.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I made sure to do so when I was making them,
but... I'm worried about the result.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...Can I try putting my feelings into them once
more before you eat? I know this hardly makes
for good manners, but...
choice_data_list: Of course. Would you do the honors?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you! Here goes, then... Hear my words,
gift of chocolate!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Captivate my trainer's taste buds! Your princess
commands it!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Th-that should do it. ...Please enjoy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Urged on by a strangely nervous Kawakami
Princess, I lift a cupcake out of the box and take
a bite.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Gulp!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess she's not very used to making food for
others. The taste inside my mouth fluctuates
between a burnt bitterness and the sweetness of
unmixed sugar.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But...
choice_data_list: I can taste the love you put into it.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, truly?! Hehe, I'm so glad that you like
it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I give Kawakami Princess some
sweets I made for her in return.
